data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin returns to a strong range; the crypto market may see a rotation of funds from precious metals.
data.description: Bitcoin broke through $97,000 this week, surpassing a key resistance level that had held for nearly two months. While it had previously lagged behind the stock market and precious metals, it finally broke through the $95,000 level that had been limiting its gains since November. As potential further devaluation of the US fiat currency pushes up precious metal prices, Bitcoin's low price relative to precious metals may stimulate a rotation of funds into digital assets, and market sentiment has turned "greedy." On the regulatory front, the US Senate Banking Committee delayed its revisions to the crypto market structure bill, and Coinbase withdrew its support for the bill, which could have some impact on the crypto market. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Analysis: The crypto market will undergo structural adjustments in 2026, with the focus shifting from price volatility to infrastructure development.
data.description: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken predicts a major market correction in 2026, with the focus shifting from price volatility to infrastructure development. Kraken Global Economist Thomas Perfumo points out that macroeconomic uncertainty, institutional fund flows, and an increasingly tightly integrated market structure are reshaping the Bitcoin cycle. Perfumo states that while Bitcoin remains a key indicator of risk sentiment, demand, liquidity, and risk channels have changed. Last year, US-listed spot Bitcoin ETFs and digital asset finance companies contributed nearly $44 billion in net spot demand, but market performance fell short of expectations due to a large supply of tradable inventory from long-term holders. This year, regulatory developments in the US will reshape on-chain liquidity. Without a clear risk appetite backdrop, a slowdown in institutional instrument momentum and premium compression could limit Bitcoin's upside potential. (The Block)

data.title: Hong Kong's Derlin Holdings Subsidiary Gains Approval for Virtual Asset Advisory Services
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Hong Kong-listed Derlin Holdings announced that its subsidiary, Derlin Securities (Hong Kong) Limited, received conditional approval from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission (SFC) on January 15 to offer virtual asset advisory services. This approval allows the company to upgrade its existing Type 4 license, which permits advising on securities.

Under the conditions of the approval, Derlin Securities can only provide these advisory services to professional investors who are existing clients of its Type 4 business. Additionally, Derlin Securities had previously been approved to upgrade its Type 1 license for dealing in securities.

Derlin Holdings stated that it expects to officially launch virtual asset trading services in February, following the completion of system integration and testing with SFC-licensed platforms. This license upgrade is intended to support the group's strategic focus on the tokenization of virtual and real-world assets.

data.title: Aether Holding Acquires Crypto News Platform Coinstack
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Nasdaq-listed company Aether Holding has announced the acquisition of the cryptocurrency news platform Coinstack through its subsidiary Alpha Edge Media. The specific financial details of the acquisition have not been disclosed. The acquisition aims to enhance Aether Holding's existing market analysis, research, and content operations. Following the completion of the transaction, Coinstack will continue to operate under its current brand.

data.title: Forward Industries Reveals Solana Holdings and Staking Rewards
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, Forward Industries, a Nasdaq-listed company, has released its financial performance report, revealing its holdings of 6,979,967.46 SOL. Since establishing its Solana treasury, the company has staked nearly all of its SOL, earning 133,450 SOL in staking rewards.

Additionally, Forward Industries disclosed that its SEC-registered shares were launched on the Solana blockchain last December through the Opening Bell platform under Superstate.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital, a TON treasury company, raised $15 million through a registered offering of common stock.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed AlphaTON Capital, a TON treasury firm, announced a $15 million fundraising through a registered offering of 15,000,000 common shares at $1 each. HC Wainwright & Co. acted as the sole placement agent for the offering. The company stated that it plans to use the net proceeds to expand Cocoon AI's GPU deployment, replenish working capital, and for general corporate purposes. (Globenewswire)

data.title: NIP Group disclosed that its initial Bitcoin mining operation produced 151.4 BTC.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed NIP Group disclosed that during its initial operational period (September-November 2025) after deploying its Bitcoin mining operations, it mined 151.4 BTC, worth approximately $14.2 million. As of January 15th, its mining hashrate was 9.66 EH/s. The company stated that it will further expand its mining deployment in January, expecting to produce approximately 140 Bitcoins per month thereafter. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Analysis: Crypto market sentiment has reversed; investigations surrounding Federal Reserve Chairman Powell may inject a "risk premium" into Bitcoin.
data.description: The crypto market experienced its largest short squeeze since the "10/11 crash" this week, with investor sentiment shifting from fear to greed. Nicolai Sondergaard, research analyst at crypto data analytics platform Nansen, stated that rising uncertainty surrounding the Federal Reserve's independence and geopolitical concerns are structurally positive factors for Bitcoin. While precious metals remain the primary beneficiaries of the current market environment, Bitcoin is increasingly becoming part of the discussion as an alternative reserve asset, and the criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell could bring a "risk premium" to BTC. Market data shows that Bitcoin's price has risen 10.6% year-to-date, while the US Dollar Index (DXY) has risen 0.75% over the same period. (Cointelegraph)

data.description:
A European country struggling with sanctions will allow banks to use Bitcoin and altcoins. Continue Reading: A European Country Will Allow Banks to Work with Bitcoin and Altcoins

data.title: Why Is ImmunityBio (IBRX) Stock Up Premarket? ANKTIVA Sales Jump 700%
data.description:
ImmunityBio stock jumped after the company reported preliminary 2025 net product revenue of $113 million, up about 700% year over year.
source: https://tokenist.com/why-is-immunitybio-ibrx-stock-up-premarket-anktiva-sales-jump-700/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=why-is-immunitybio-ibrx-stock-up-premarket-anktiva-sales-jump-700

data.title: IRS Proposes Tax Changes for Sovereign Wealth and Public Pension Funds
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Internal Revenue Service (IRS) has proposed amendments to Section 892 of the tax code, aiming to redefine certain direct investment activities by sovereign wealth funds (SWFs) and public pension funds as 'commercial activities' subject to taxation. The proposed changes could encompass activities such as direct lending, debt restructuring, and co-investments, potentially impacting previously completed investment projects. This proposal is seen as a move that might compel SWFs to adopt more passive investment strategies. The comment period for this proposal will conclude on February 13.

data.title: Forward Industries: SOL holdings increased to nearly 6.98 million, with staking rewards reaching 133,450 SOL.
data.description: Forward Industries, the Nasdaq-listed Solana treasury company, released its financial results, disclosing that as of January 15th, it held a total of 6,979,967.46 SOL. Since the establishment of the Solana treasury, it has staked almost all of its SOL and received 133,450 SOL in staking rewards. Furthermore, Forward Industries disclosed that its SEC-registered shares were listed on the Solana blockchain last December through Superstate's Opening Bell platform. (Businesswire)

data.title: Binance Launches Yooldo Trading Competition with ESPORTS Token Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch the Yooldo Trading Competition on Binance Alpha, offering users the chance to earn ESPORTS tokens as rewards. The competition will run from 2026-01-16 13:00 (UTC) to 2026-01-30 13:00 (UTC). Participants will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of ESPORTS tokens during this period. The top 6,900 users will share a pool of 448,500 ESPORTS tokens, with each eligible participant receiving 65 ESPORTS tokens. Only trades executed via Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha will qualify, excluding third-party dApp transactions. Participants must update their Binance App to the latest version and ensure they have created and backed up a Binance Wallet (Keyless) to join the competition.

The reward distribution is scheduled to occur before 2026-02-13 13:00:00 (UTC), with winners able to check their token rewards directly on their Binance Alpha accounts or Binance Wallet (Keyless). Binance reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior, such as wash trading or market manipulation. Additionally, Binance may amend the competition terms at its discretion, including changes to eligibility criteria and the number of winners. Users are advised to be aware of any restrictions related to Binance services in their region. The announcement emphasizes the volatility of digital asset prices and advises users to make informed investment decisions. Binance Alpha features emerging digital assets not listed on the Binance Exchange, which may have low market capitalization and unique characteristics. Users are reminded of the risks associated with investing in Alpha Assets, including increased price volatility and potential loss of investment value.

data.title: Hong Kong-based Delin Securities has been granted a new license to provide virtual asset advisory services.
data.description: According to an announcement from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Delin Holdings, a Hong Kong-listed company, announced that it has received approval from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission to upgrade its license to Type 4 (advising on securities) regulated activities and will launch virtual asset advisory services.

data.title: Belarus has authorized the establishment of a "crypto bank" framework, which can combine token-based business with traditional banking services.
data.description: Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko signed Decree No. 19 on January 16, establishing a framework for “crypto banks.” According to a statement from the Belarusian Presidential Office, the decree allows joint-stock companies located in the state-owned High-Tech Park (HTP) special economic zone to combine token business with traditional banking, payment, and other financial services. Crypto banks are defined as joint-stock companies authorized to conduct such combined business and subject to dual regulation by HTP and the National Bank of the Republic of Belarus. Entities must be residents of the High-Tech Park and listed in a special register of crypto banks maintained by the central bank. (The Block)

data.title: Hong Kong's Deputy Financial Secretary stated that stablecoin development will prioritize stability over progress, and the central gold clearing system is planned to begin operation this year.
data.description: In his address at an event, Hong Kong's Deputy Financial Secretary Michael Wong addressed the topic of digital and crypto assets. He stated that Hong Kong will further promote the development of stablecoins, but emphasized "stability first, then progress," preventing the inflow of illicit funds and ensuring the robustness of the financial system. Furthermore, Wong pointed out that Hong Kong is actively expanding its gold storage capacity, aiming to increase the total capacity to 2,000 tons within the next three years. A central gold clearing system is currently being established, with the Shanghai Gold Exchange invited to participate, and the system is targeted to be operational this year. (Sina Finance)

data.title: Strategy will release its Q4 2025 financial results on February 5th.
data.description: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy announced that it will release its fourth-quarter 2025 financial results on Thursday, February 5, 2026, after the close of the U.S. financial markets. A virtual meeting will be held at 5:00 PM Eastern Time to discuss the results. The company currently holds 687,410 Bitcoins, with a market value of approximately $66.47 billion. (Businesswire)

data.title: Nic Carter Criticizes AI-Driven Content on Social Media Platforms
data.description:
According to Odaily, Nic Carter, known as the father of smart contracts and co-founder of Castle Island Ventures, expressed concerns on the X platform about the proliferation of low-quality content due to incentivized posts combined with AI. Carter noted that the early appeal of crypto tweets lay in grassroots competition, but the industry's growth focus has shifted towards stablecoins and financial infrastructure, favoring institutional and venture capital narratives. This shift has made it difficult for ordinary retail investors to feel they have opportunities for fair participation and wealth creation, leading to decreased enthusiasm.

Carter also pointed out that the 'de-niche' design of the X platform, which emphasizes 'For You' recommendations, makes it challenging for creators to reach their niche communities, reducing the chances for specialized crypto content to be recommended. He added that the X platform has swiftly responded by revoking API access for the 'InfoFi' application to reduce spam content, a move he strongly supports.
